title: Savory Juicy Lentil Stir-fry
description: A savory and juicy mid-night craving Turkish dish featuring flat rice noodles and lentils, this Jain-friendly recipe combines a blend of spices to create an irresistible meal.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the cumin seeds and let them sizzle for about 30 seconds.
Add garlic and red onion to the skillet and stir-fry until the onions are translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the soaked and prepped lentils to the skillet along with the flat rice noodles. Stir well to combine ingredients evenly.

Pour in enough water (about 1/2 cup) to cover the lentils and noodles. Bring to a boil then reduce heat and let simmer for about 10 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the noodles are tender.
Stir in fresh parsley just before serving. Serve hot as a snack with a side of yogurt if desired.
